title: Cynoglossum shepardii
taxonomy: Cynoglossum shepardii is a species of flowering plant in the borage family, Boraginaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is a perennial herb with blue to purple flowers, which are often arranged in a terminal cluster. Cynoglossum shepardii is often classified as a member of the genus Cynoglossum, which includes other species of forget-me-not plants. The species is also sometimes referred to as a type of blue forget-me-not due to its distinctive flower color.
